projects.name: Date-Time Library
projects.description: Research-driven Rust library for robust temporal modeling with variable precision, interval reasoning, time zone support, leap second handling, and Python bindings.
highlights: Designed a custom temporal model supporting variable-precision date and time representations from year to millisecond granularity
Implemented interval-based temporal reasoning using Allen interval algebra and three-valued logic
Developed support for UTC, TAI, and Unix time representations with conversion between formats
Implemented leap second detection and handling using official IERS leap second data
Created date-time arithmetic operations including second, minute, hour, day, month, and year calculations
Implemented parsing, validation, and normalization of temporal values
Developed Unix timestamp conversion with temporal edge-case handling
Created Python bindings using PyO3
Built comprehensive unit tests covering leap years, leap seconds, interval relations, and timestamp conversions

projects.name: HKR Beauty Salon
projects.description: Fullstack web application for a beauty salon featuring booking management, authentication, email notifications, and customer loyalty functionality.
highlights: Built user registration and login functionality using JWT authentication
Integrated Google OAuth authentication
Implemented appointment booking and reservation workflows
Designed MongoDB models for users, bookings, employees, services, and available times
Created REST APIs for users, bookings, employees, services, mail, statistics, and administration
Implemented role-based authorization for admin and customer accounts
Built email confirmation functionality for customer bookings
Developed customer loyalty and discount coupon functionality
Created administrative statistics dashboards

projects.name: Smart House Backend
projects.description: Backend system for controlling and managing smart home devices through authenticated REST APIs.
highlights: Designed REST APIs for authentication and smart device management
Implemented JWT-based authentication and authorization
Created secure login and registration endpoints
Developed middleware for protecting authenticated routes
Implemented APIs for controlling smart house devices using command-based requests
Built support for LCD display messaging through backend endpoints
Designed backend architecture suitable for IoT device communication
Implemented secure access control for connected devices

projects.name: Combitech Android Application
projects.description: Android application built using clean architecture principles, repository pattern, dependency injection, and modern Android development practices.
highlights: Implemented feature-based clean architecture with separation of data, domain, and presentation layers
Designed repository interfaces and implementations to decouple business logic from data access
Used Room for local persistence and Retrofit for remote API communication
Implemented use case driven architecture for business operations
Used Kotlin Flow for asynchronous data streaming and state management
Implemented dependency injection using Dagger/Hilt modules
Mapped DTOs into domain models to isolate external API contracts
Created reusable UI components and ViewModels
Applied MVVM and clean architecture principles throughout the application
